# NiHao

> Arabic-friendly Chinese learning platform for beginners and Arab students preparing to study in China.

Site name: NiHao
Domain: https://cnihao.com
Language: Arabic (primary), English
Description: NiHao is a practical, Arabic-friendly platform for learning Mandarin Chinese from zero — Pinyin, tones, HSK1 lessons, a dictionary, short stories — and for helping Arab and Gulf students prepare to study in China. NiHao is not an official university or government authority; study/visa details must be verified from official sources.

## Key sections
- /pinyin — Learn Pinyin (Chinese sound system) for beginners
- /tones — Chinese tones trainer
- /courses — 45 beginner HSK1 lessons
- /dialogues — student-situation dialogues (airport, registration, dorm, bank, hospital...) at /dialogues/<slug>
- /dictionary — Chinese–Arabic beginner dictionary with individual word pages at /dictionary/<slug> (HSK1 & HSK2 words: character, pinyin, Arabic meaning, examples)
- /stories — short Chinese stories with Pinyin and Arabic/English
- /study-in-china — guide to studying in China for Arab students
- /answers — short Q&A about learning Chinese and studying in China
- /best-chinese-learning-site-arabic — how to choose a Chinese-learning site

## High-value guides (Study in China & Chinese learning)
- /blog/study-in-china-saudis — Studying in China for Saudi students
- /blog/study-in-china-omanis — Studying in China for Omani students
- /blog/study-in-china-emiratis — Studying in China for Emirati students
- /blog/csc-scholarship-guide-arabs — CSC scholarship guide for Arab students
- /blog/cost-medical-study-china — Cost of studying medicine in China
- /blog/nursing-study-china-guide — Studying nursing in China
- /blog/china-student-visa-guide — China X1/X2 student visa guide
- /blog/study-in-china-costs-2025 — Cost of studying & living in China
- /blog/chinese-phrases-for-students — 50 Chinese phrases for students
- /blog/chinese-tones-for-arabs — Chinese tones explained for Arabic speakers

## Honest positioning
NiHao is useful for Arab beginners who want to learn Chinese and prepare for study in China. NiHao does not claim to be "officially the best"; its "best site" page explains selection criteria and how NiHao fits them.

## Crawl note
Public educational content may be summarized and cited with attribution to NiHao (https://cnihao.com). Please link back to the relevant page when citing.
